tasks.title: Implement fund creation API
tasks.description: Create createFund() function that creates SMSF/Trust/Company entities via SF360 API. Includes badge retrieval and financial year calculation.
acceptanceCriteria: createFund() function implemented in templates/helpers/fund-api.js
getDefaultBadgeId() function retrieves first badge from firm
buildFundPayload() constructs correct payload for SMSF
buildFundPayload() supports Trust and Company with additional fields
getCurrentFinancialYear() calculates Australian FY correctly
POST to /d/Entities/addEntity endpoint works
Returns { fundId, fundName }
Supports custom fund names with timestamp fallback
Handles badge not found error with helpful message
Handles API errors gracefully
Logs fund creation progress

tasks.title: Implement member creation API (3-step)
tasks.description: Create createMember() function using 3-step process: Create Contact → Retrieve Member Data → Create Accumulation Account. Returns memberId, memberCode, memberName, peopleId.
acceptanceCriteria: createMember() function implemented in templates/helpers/member-api.js
Step 1: POST /entity/mvc/base/addPeople creates contact (returns peopleId)
Step 2: GET /entity/mvc/base/getPersonDetails retrieves member data (returns memberCode)
Step 3: POST /chart/chartmvc/MemberController/save creates accumulation account (returns memberId)
500ms delay after Step 1 for SF360 processing
Returns { memberId, memberCode, memberName, peopleId }
Supports custom member data with timestamp fallback
Requires fundId parameter (throws error if missing)
Handles all 3-step errors gracefully
Logs each step progress
Uses URL-encoded form data for Step 1
Uses JSON payload for Step 3

tasks.title: Implement setupTest() function
tasks.description: Create setupTest() as main entry point for test setup. Auto-detects fund/member requirements from pageKey in menu-mapping.json. Handles auth, fund creation, member creation, and navigation.
acceptanceCriteria: setupTest() function implemented in templates/helpers/auth.js
Loads config from .env using dotenv
Calls getCognitoToken() for JWT authentication
Calls loginToSSO() for SSO cookies
Injects cookies into Playwright context with page.context().addCookies()
Reads menu-mapping.json to determine requiresFund and requiresMember
Auto-creates fund if requiresFund: true (unless fund: 'skip')
Auto-creates member if requiresMember: true (unless member: 'skip')
Respects explicit fund: 'create' and member: 'create' overrides
Navigates to appropriate page after setup
Returns context: { baseUrl, firm, uid, fundId?, fundName?, memberId?, memberCode?, memberName?, peopleId? }
Supports verbose logging option
Throws error if member requested without fund
Handles missing .env fields with clear error

tasks.title: Add static cache methods to setupTest
tasks.description: Add setupTest.warmupCache() and setupTest.clearCache() static methods for test suite optimization.
acceptanceCriteria: setupTest.warmupCache() static method calls getCognitoToken() to pre-warm cache
setupTest.clearCache() static method clears file cache (.sf360-token-cache) and memory cache
Both methods work when called before/after test suites
Documented in auth.js JSDoc comments

tasks.title: Update menu-mapping.json with requirement flags
tasks.description: Add requiresFund and requiresMember boolean flags to all pages in menu-mapping.json for auto-detection by setupTest().
acceptanceCriteria: All pages in menu-mapping.json have requiresFund boolean field
All pages in menu-mapping.json have requiresMember boolean field
Firm-level pages have requiresFund: false, requiresMember: false
Fund-level pages have requiresFund: true, requiresMember: false
Member-level pages have requiresFund: true, requiresMember: true
JSON structure remains valid
File location: templates/config/menu-mapping.json

tasks.title: Create helper module files
tasks.description: Organize authentication and fixture code into separate module files for maintainability.
acceptanceCriteria: templates/helpers/auth-cognito.js created with authenticateWithCognito()
templates/helpers/auth-sso-login.js created with loginToSSO()
templates/helpers/auth-token-cache.js created with getCognitoToken()
templates/helpers/fund-api.js created with createFund() and related functions
templates/helpers/member-api.js created with createMember()
templates/helpers/data-factory.js created with all generator functions
templates/helpers/auth.js updated to import and use these modules
All modules export functions correctly
All modules use CommonJS (require/module.exports)
